changes_made.summary: Extracted ResizableColumn helper component to deduplicate the activity-pane and history-pane column blocks (both had identical wrapper structure: id + data-testid + aria-label + width style + transition class + ErrorBoundary + PaneResizer). The two call sites now pass column-specific config as props. DOM contract (id, data-testid, aria-label, style.width) is preserved exactly; all WorktreeDesktopLayout.test.tsx assertions still pass.

deferred_improvements: handleActivityToggle and handleHistoryPaneResize in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx are thin pass-through wrappers (1-line useCallback) that could be removed by passing toggleActivity and setHistoryWidth directly to ActivityBar and WorktreeDesktopLayout. Skipped because (a) the wrappers add a stable identity layer that decouples the consumer from the hook's exact callback identity, (b) the change touches the well-tested memo deps and risks subtle re-render differences, and (c) the readability benefit is marginal. Document candidate for a future PR if/when these wrappers grow logic.

useActivityBarState and useHistoryPaneState use a simpler hydration pattern (single useEffect with [] deps that reads localStorage once) than useWorktreeUIState's isHydratedRef pattern. The patterns are intentionally different: useWorktreeUIState depends on useLocalStorageState (which subscribes to storage events and re-emits), so it needs the ref to avoid re-running on every storage-event-driven state change; the new hooks own their localStorage I/O directly and never re-read after mount, so a single useEffect is sufficient and correct. No alignment needed.

ActivityPane.tsx already uses the pre-built ActivityContentMap pattern (parent-owned content + ERROR_BOUNDARY_NAMES map keyed by ActivityId). The switch-case-with-similar-wrappers anti-pattern is not present. No refactor needed.

All four memos in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx (activityBarMemo, activityContent, activityPaneMemo, historyPaneMemo) have accurate dependency arrays. Each memo's JSX references were cross-checked against its deps list — no over-/under-inclusive deps found. The maintenance-note comments (Issue #411 R3-007 / Issue #727) are present and clear.

Test files for the new hooks/components are well-structured: ActivityBar.test.tsx covers all 6 tabs, aria attributes, keyboard nav (Enter/Space/ArrowUp/ArrowDown), and active=null edge case; ActivityPane.test.tsx uses it.each for ErrorBoundary names across all 6 activities; the two hook tests cleanup localStorage in beforeEach/afterEach. No brittle selectors, no duplicate setup.
notes: Refactor scope was narrow on purpose. The TDD agent produced clean code in this iteration (good naming, accurate memo deps, table-driven patterns where appropriate, JSDoc on all new modules). The only behavior-preserving structural win identified was the activity-pane / history-pane column block duplication in WorktreeDesktopLayout.tsx, addressed by a 28-line ResizableColumn helper that collapses ~32 lines of repeated JSX into two call sites of 9 lines each (net negative LOC, clearer intent). Quality gates after refactor: tsc=pass, lint=pass, 6610/6617 unit tests pass (7 pre-existing skips), Next.js build succeeds. Note: This commit also lands the full Issue #727 implementation that the TDD agent left uncommitted in the working tree.
